column1: # plugin-recipes.tsv — map each plugins/source/{lv2,vst3}/<folder> to the recipe
# (a build_<name> function in scripts/recipes/{lv2,vst3}.sh, dispatched by
# Several recipes build many catalogue entries: dragonfly-reverb yields 4
# plugins, caps-lv2 yields 7, gxplugins yields 38, etc. A single touched
# plugin folder dispatches its whole recipe so the bundle stays consistent.
# Recipe '-' means "no upstream mapped" — the workflow skips these. They
# need an orphan-discovery pass (separate issue) before they can build.
